title: Wall Street closes mixed with Dow up and slight Nasdaq declines; Super Micro Computer rises 21%
summary: In a low-volatility session, the Dow Jones rose marginally while the Nasdaq lost ground, highlighting the strong advance of Super Micro Computer and Constellation Energy.

title: Oil exceeds $95 and European gas rises due to Trump's threats to Iran; Goldman expects it to reach $120
summary: Crude oil and gas surge amid rising geopolitical tensions, as the US president promises to destroy Iranian infrastructure and Goldman Sachs forecasts further increases.

title: Ibex 35 rises 0.99% and approaches 19,600 points boosted by results
summary: The Spanish benchmark closed higher, with Naturgy and Cellnex as the most bullish stocks, encouraged by the corporate results presented.

title: Nestlé finalizes sale of a stake in its Perrier water business to Platinum Equity
summary: The deal, which could close soon, values the unit at around €5 billion, aligned with the company's strategy to optimize its portfolio.

title: Wall Street banks benefit from the IPO boom while private capital loses ground
summary: The increase in listings and mergers boosts investment banking revenues, leaving private equity funds behind.

title: German DAX hits two-week highs boosted by Airbus's 7% rise
summary: The German index closed higher, led by Airbus, which soared more than 7% after favorable news.

title: Yen falls to 163 per dollar and Japanese government warns of intervention
summary: The Japanese currency continues to weaken, prompting Tokyo to threaten to take decisive steps to stop the depreciation.
